title: Lilly's Foundayo Passes Heart Safety Test; FDA Requests Liver Evaluation
headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 obesity pill Foundayo (orforglipron) clears cardiovascular safety in ACHIEVE-4 diabetes trial, positioning it for diabetes filing, while FDA requests liver risk evaluation.
key_facts: ACHIEVE-4 trial results April 16, 2026; FDA approval letter requests liver risk evaluation

title: Cochrane Review Calls Anti-Amyloid Alzheimer's Drugs 'Trivial'
headline: A Cochrane systematic review published April 16 concludes anti-amyloid Alzheimer's drugs show 'trivial' clinical effects, drawing immediate backlash from researchers and drugmakers.
key_facts: Cochrane review published April 16, 2026; anti-amyloid drugs dismissed as trivial

title: Roche Plans New Phase 3 Trial for Elevidys After EU Setback
headline: Roche announces plans to initiate a new Phase 3 trial for gene therapy Elevidys (delandistrogene moxeparvovec) for Duchenne muscular dystrophy following EU regulatory rejection.
key_facts: New Phase 3 planned following EU setback in 2025; Elevidys approved in U.S.

title: Kailera Therapeutics Prices IPO at $533M
headline: Clinical-stage GLP-1/obesity biotech Kailera Therapeutics prices IPO aiming to raise up to $533 million for weekly injection and daily oral pill development.
key_facts: $533 million IPO raise; developing weekly GLP-1 injection and daily oral pill; targeting billion-dollar-plus valuation

title: Daiichi Sankyo Sells Consumer Health Unit to Suntory for $1.5B
headline: Daiichi Sankyo agrees to sell its consumer health business to Suntory for $1.5 billion as part of strategic focus on oncology and ADC pipeline.
key_facts: $1.5 billion divestiture; strategic pivot to oncology/ADC focus

title: Obsidian/Galera Reverse Merger Closes with $350M PIPE
headline: Obsidian Therapeutics and Galera Therapeutics complete reverse merger to advance cell therapy platform with $350 million in committed PIPE proceeds.
key_facts: $350 million PIPE gross proceeds; combined company trading on Nasdaq under ticker OBX

title: Lilly Acquires CrossBridge Bio for $300M ADC Technology
headline: Eli Lilly acquires CrossBridge Bio for up to $300 million to strengthen its antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) portfolio with dual-payload technology.
key_facts: Up to $300 million acquisition; dual-payload ADC technology

title: Revolution Medicines Prices $2B Raise on Pancreatic Cancer Data
headline: Revolution Medicines prices $2 billion raise as its Phase 3 pancreatic cancer drug nearly doubles survival, called a 'game changer' by analysts.
key_facts: $2 billion raise; Phase 3 pancreatic cancer drug nearly doubles survival

title: Regeneron Enters Radiopharmaceuticals with Telix $40M Deal
headline: Regeneron enters radiopharmaceuticals market via $40 million upfront deal with Telix Pharmaceuticals.

title: Silo Pharma Surges 45% on PTSD Pipeline IP Update
headline: Silo Pharma (NASDAQ: SILO) surges 45.31% following intellectual property update tied to PTSD treatment pipeline.
key_facts: Stock surge 45.31%; PTSD treatment pipeline IP update

title: Terremoto Raises $108M for AKT-Targeting Therapies
headline: Terremoto raises $108 million to develop AKT-targeting drugs with one therapy in Phase 1 development.
key_facts: $108 million raise; one AKT-targeting therapy in Phase 1

title: Beeline Medicines Emerges with Bristol Myers Immunology Assets
headline: Beeline Medicines emerges as Bain-backed biotech with shelved Bristol Myers immunology drug programs.
key_facts: Bain Capital backed; acquired shelved Bristol Myers immunology programs

title: FDA Moves to Ease Restrictions on Unapproved Peptides
headline: FDA advisory committee to discuss easing restrictions on certain unapproved peptides, signaling potential regulatory shift.
key_facts: FDA advisory committee discussion on unapproved peptide restrictions

title: OpenAI Launches Life Sciences AI Model
headline: OpenAI debuts life sciences-specific AI model as tech giants intensify competition for pharma market.
key_facts: OpenAI life sciences AI model launch; Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan joins Anthropic board

title: RFK Jr. Defends FDA Commissioner Makary
headline: RFK Jr. defends FDA and Commissioner Makary following Republican questioning, signaling continued support for agency leadership.
key_facts: RFK Jr. defense of FDA Commissioner Makary; Republican questioning context

title: Former FDA Cancer Chief Warns of Political 'Breach' at FDA
headline: Former FDA cancer chief Richard Pazdur warns of political 'breach' at FDA, raising concerns about regulatory independence.
key_facts: Richard Pazdur political concerns regarding FDA independence

title: Erica Schwartz Named Next CDC Director
headline: Erica Schwartz, former deputy surgeon general, selected as next CDC director.
key_facts: Erica Schwartz appointment as CDC director; former deputy surgeon general

title: UnitedHealth Stock Down 54% from 52-Week High
headline: UnitedHealth stock down 54% from 52-week high with Q1 earnings due April 21 and membership contraction expected to 46.9–47.5 million.
key_facts: Stock down 54% from 52-week high; membership contraction from 49.8 million to 46.9–47.5 million; Q1 earnings due April 21
